rulings.Case Title: VATCHE CABAYAN M.D. VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Moiton To Disqualify Opposing Counsel And For Other Appropriate Relief
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 8, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND Motion To Disqualify Opposing Counsel And For Other Appropriate Relief. Defendant¿s Motion to Disqualify Plaintiff¿s Counsel is denied. The Court finds that Defendant¿s counsel was not diligent in attempting to retrieve the documents from Plaintiff¿s counsel. Furthermore, defendant does not provide sufficient explanation as to the inadvertence in the release of the documents or the delay in retrieving them. Moreover, the fact that the Defendants did not alert the Court, in their Reply brief to the Anti-SLAPP Motion, to the fact that the documents cited in Plaintiff¿s Opposition contained these Attorney-Client Privileged Document raises questions as to the motive behind the bringing of this motion following the briefing on the Anti-SLAPP Motion to Strike. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELICA M. GONZALEZ VS. ALFONSO PICAZO, AS TRUSTEES OF THE ARTHUR AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Strike The Thrid Amended Cross-Complaint, Or In The Alternativew Mlotion To Strike Portions Of Third Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 8, 2011, line 6, PLAINTIFF ANGELICA GONZALEZ Motion To Strike The Third Amended Cross-Complaint, Or In The Alternative Motion To Strike Portions Of Third Amended Cross-Complaint. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY IS DENIED. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE IS GRANTED. THE MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 22-25 IS GRANTED WHICH RELATE TO 2006-2008 BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT CLAIMS IS GRANTED BECAUSE THEY EXCEED THE 2 YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THE MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPH 45 IS DENIED BECAUSE IT IS NOT COVERED UNDER THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. THIS RELATES TO A NON-JUDICIAL PROCEEDING. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYERS FOR RELIEF 4, 5 AND 6 IS DENIED. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS GRANTED. =(302/LMG)
